positive: A whimsical and symmetrical arrangement of celestial forest elements: glowing bioluminescent flora, abstract nebula swirls in emerald and indigo, and stylized crescent moons intertwined with delicate, curving branches. The composition must feature bold, clean silhouettes against a deep cosmic background. Style is modern minimalist sacred geometry and art nouveau, utilizing high contrast negative space. Center composition, perfect for apparel printing, with sharp linework and vibrant yet deep color palette. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, graphic novel quality.
negative: lowres, blur, grainy, text, signature, watermark, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, fused fingers, artifacts, low quality, poorly rendered, cartoon, photorealistic
